meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills for High-Speed SaaS Dev
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to overcome development plateaus. This advanced guide provides actionable workflows using Antigravity to scale your freelance output.
content.answer_block: Stop building basic CRUD apps. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain an autonomous engineering partner that handles complex architectural refactoring and boilerplate generation. This workflow shifts your role from manual coder to lead architect, allowing you to ship production-ready SaaS features in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The freelance graveyard is filled with developers who spent months building the same basic todo lists and authentication boilerplates. You feel the friction: the constant context switching, the repetitive debugging, and the nagging feeling that your output velocity is hitting a glass ceiling. You aren't lacking skill; you are lacking leverage.

Imagine a workflow where your architectural intent is executed instantly by a specialized AI agent. By mastering Claude Code in tandem with Antigravity, you transform your terminal into a high-octane engineering suite. This isn't just about faster typing—it is about shipping high-value, complex features that command premium freelance rates.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Define your SaaS domain model before writing a single line of code to ensure the AI understands your system constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level technical specification for a multi-tenant SaaS application using Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS. Focus on modularity.

steps.title: Autonomous Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold the entire project structure based on your architectural blueprint, ensuring type safety from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure and initial configuration for a production-ready SaaS, prioritizing clean architecture and separation of concerns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "scaffold project based on the provided technical blueprint"

steps.title: Advanced Component Injection
steps.description: Inject complex UI components that require state management and API integration without manually configuring boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable, accessible data table component with server-side filtering and sorting capabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add "create data table component with filtering"

steps.title: Automated Bug Remediation
steps.description: Use Claude's deep context window to trace errors across multiple files simultaneously, fixing issues that would take hours to debug manually.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase for potential race conditions in the authentication middleware and suggest a robust fix.

steps.title: Deployment-Ready Refactoring
steps.description: Finalize your code for production, focusing on tree-shaking, bundle size optimization, and security hardening.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit and performance optimization review on the current codebase, focusing on minimizing bundle size.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit "Refactor for production performance and security hardening"

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, saving tokens and focus.
Maintain a 'Project Memory' markdown file in your root folder; Claude Code will ingest this to maintain architectural consistency across long sessions.
Use Claude's 'branch' capability to test risky architectural changes without affecting your stable main branch.
Leverage the --read-only flag for legacy codebases to prevent accidental destructive changes during exploration.
Pipe your terminal history into Claude when stuck to provide the AI with the exact sequence of commands that led to a failure.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, focus on creating a 'Custom Skill' library within Antigravity that automates your specific, repeatable freelance workflows.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical leverage to outperform your competition and deliver high-value SaaS products at record speeds. Stop grinding and start architecting. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
